summary: Frontend-only verification of ALPHA VAULT new owner changes: single-credential auth (obaidtradez/Odm200429), signup/forgot link/route removal, dashboard 'Trending Now' banner, Discovery & Top Plays insider/institutional chips, plus regression on /news, /top-plays, /future-giants. All requested flows pass.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.signup() is still exposed in the context value even though /auth/signup now redirects. It is unreachable in the UI but still callable from any component that calls useAuth().signup(); for true single-credential lockdown, consider removing signup from the context/exports.

AuthContext.login stores the bearer token only in localStorage (alphavault_user.token). It is not sent on any subsequent /api requests (no Authorization header), so the token is effectively ornamental. If backend ever starts requiring it, frontend will need updating.

Dashboard 'Demo Mode · Connect APIs' banner remains visible after login because hasApiKeys is computed from per-user apiKeys (empty by default). Out of scope per spec, but worth flagging if owner expects 'Live Data' chip post-login.
test_credentials: App login: obaidtradez / Odm200429 (only credential accepted).
seed_data_creation: None — server-side credential check is sufficient. localStorage is populated automatically by AuthContext on successful login (id=email=name='obaidtradez', hasCompletedOnboarding=true).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All seven target items verified end-to-end via Playwright against https://local-repair-fix.preview.emergentagent.com. Evidence — AUTH wrong-creds: obaidtradez/wrongpass and someoneelse/Odm200429 both stayed on /auth/login with 'Invalid' toast. AUTH no-links: page HTML contains neither 'Create one'/'/auth/signup'/'Sign up' nor 'Forgot password'/'/auth/forgot-password'. AUTH route guards: /auth/signup and /auth/forgot-password both redirect to /auth/login. AUTH correct: obaidtradez/Odm200429 → landed on '/'. TRENDING: data-testid='trending-now-banner' visible with top idea AEM (Agnico Eagle Mines · Basic Materials · 10 mentions (30d) · Positive news · $165.47 · +50.0% PT); clicking trending-top-idea navigated to /research?ticker=AEM; clicking trending-all-ideas navigated to /news. DISCOVERY: 36 data-testid='discovery-ownership' chips rendered cleanly (sample: 'Insider: Net selling'). TOP PLAYS ownership: data-testid='top-play-ownership' rendered cleanly after expanding 'Full thesis' (sample: 'Ownership & Insider Activity Insider: Mixed') — sparse data as expected (~1-4 of 25). REGRESSION: /news has 40 news-card + 10 news-suggestion-card; /top-plays has 25 'Current: $' occurrences; /future-giants has 12 'Price: $' occurrences. Backend curls: POST /api/auth/access returns {success:true,token:...} for correct creds and {success:false,message:'Invalid access code'} for wrong creds; GET /api/auth/debug returns 404 (correctly removed).
rca of the issue: No bug — every requested change is wired correctly and integrated with the backend. The minor non-blockers above (signup helper still in context, token not echoed on subsequent requests, persistent Demo Mode chip) are noted for the main agent to consider but do not affect the acceptance criteria.
